fraudulent_jobs.title: Work From Home Data Entry - $5000/month
fraudulent_jobs.description: EASY MONEY! Work from home doing simple data entry. No experience needed. Start immediately! Pay small one-time fee of $50 for training materials. You can make $5000 per month working just 2 hours per day! Limited positions available!
fraudulent_jobs.requirements: No experience needed, just a computer and internet connection. Must pay training fee first to get started.
fraudulent_jobs.responsibilities: Enter data into spreadsheets, copy-paste information, simple online tasks, process payments
fraudulent_jobs.benefits: Flexible hours, work from anywhere, unlimited earning potential, quick payments

fraudulent_jobs.title: URGENCY: Personal Assistant Needed - Send Money First
fraudulent_jobs.description: IMMEDIATE HIRE! I need a personal assistant to help me with various tasks. I'm currently traveling and need someone to handle my affairs. Please send $200 via Western Union to prove you're serious. This is a refundable security deposit. You'll earn $3000 monthly!
fraudulent_jobs.requirements: Must be trustworthy, able to send money quickly, have bank account for transfers, willing to pay security deposit
fraudulent_jobs.responsibilities: Manage personal affairs, handle financial transactions, run errands, process payments for clients
fraudulent_jobs.benefits: High salary, flexible schedule, travel opportunities, work from anywhere

fraudulent_jobs.title: Package Forwarding Coordinator - High Pay
fraudulent_jobs.description: Great opportunity! Receive packages at your home and forward them internationally. We'll pay you $100 per package plus shipping costs. All you need is a valid address and internet access. Start today! No background check required.
fraudulent_jobs.requirements: Must have residential address, able to receive packages, basic computer skills, no experience needed
fraudulent_jobs.responsibilities: Receive packages, inspect contents, forward to international addresses, handle customs paperwork
fraudulent_jobs.benefits: Work from home, flexible schedule, good pay per package, bonuses for volume

legitimate_jobs.title: Senior Frontend Developer
legitimate_jobs.description: We are looking for an experienced Frontend Developer to join our growing team. You will be responsible for building user interfaces using React, TypeScript, and modern CSS frameworks. Our company is a well-established tech firm with over 10 years in business.
legitimate_jobs.requirements: 5+ years of React experience, TypeScript expertise, strong CSS skills, experience with state management libraries, computer science degree preferred
legitimate_jobs.responsibilities: Develop responsive web applications, collaborate with UX team, optimize application performance, participate in code reviews, mentor junior developers
legitimate_jobs.benefits: Health insurance, 401k matching, remote work options, professional development budget, stock options

legitimate_jobs.title: Marketing Manager
legitimate_jobs.description: Join our marketing team at a leading retail company. We are seeking a creative Marketing Manager to develop and execute marketing strategies across multiple channels. We offer competitive compensation and growth opportunities.
legitimate_jobs.requirements: Bachelor's degree in Marketing, 3+ years experience, strong analytical skills, familiarity with digital marketing tools, MBA preferred
legitimate_jobs.responsibilities: Develop marketing campaigns, manage social media presence, analyze campaign performance, coordinate with sales team, manage marketing budget
legitimate_jobs.benefits: Competitive salary, health benefits, paid time off, career growth opportunities, performance bonuses
